== Taoraemon ♂ ==
The cat robot from the future is a perfect combination of sci-fi and fantasy.

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Taoraemon, complete [[Yamato]] Key Clue "Tasty Dorayaki."

===☆☆☆ > ★☆☆===
After 8 letters back and forth, Taoraemon will arrive at the [[Home Base]] and gift {{RewardIconWithLink|Bamboo Copter|green}}.

===★☆☆ > ★★☆===
After 11 letters back and forth, Taoraemon will gift Old Fraud's Legacy (Soul of Immortal Seeker, {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +12h)

===★★☆ > ★★★ ===
Taoraemon will require 30k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}} and 5 Koryeo Snail minions. 

After 12 letters back and forth, Taoraemon will permanently move in with his minion, Catcolyte.

==Rent==
[[File:Taoraemon rent.png|frameless|left]]

Taoraemon rent is collected on '''Saturday''' and found as a clock on the wall. 

 '''Normal Rent''': random Speedup +10m

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Atomic Clock|blue}} +10

 '''1-time Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Time Adjuster|green}}

{{clear}}

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}}!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +1h
|-
|★★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +1h
|-
|★★★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +1h
|-
|★★★★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +2h
|-
|★★★★★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +3h
|-
|★★★★★★
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +4h
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Linde's Fridge}}{{Relink|Linde's Fridge}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Faraday's Dynamo}}{{Relink|Faraday's Dynamo}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Turing Machine}}{{Relink|Turing Machine}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Tree of Life}}{{Relink|Tree of Life}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Tokamak}}{{Relink|Tokamak}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Sputnik 1}}{{Relink|Sputnik 1}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Element R.}}{{Relink|Element R.}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Dyson Sphere}}{{Relink|Dyson Sphere}}
|}

==Taoraemon 5D Tech==
Taoraemon came from the 22nd century, with access to technologies far advanced than the current generation, and willing to share...

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||TECH +5||All Gene Research SPD +1%
|-
|2||180||2k||TECH +10||All Gene Research SPD +2%
|-
|3||190||4.5k||TECH +15||All Gene Research SPD +3%
|-
|4||200||8k||TECH +20||All Gene Research SPD +4%
|-
|5||210||12.5k||TECH +25||All Gene Research SPD +5%
|-
|6||220||18k||TECH +30||All Gene Research SPD +6%
|-
|7||230||24.5k||TECH +35||All Gene Research SPD +7% 
|-
|8||240||32k||TECH +40||All Gene Research SPD +8%
|-
|9||250||40.5k||TECH +45||All Gene Research SPD +9%
|-
|10||260||50k||TECH +50||All Gene Research SPD +10%
|-
|11||270||60.5k||TECH +55||All Gene Research SPD +11%
|-
|12||285||72k||TECH +60||All Gene Research SPD +12%
|-
|13||300||84.5k||TECH +65||All Gene Research SPD +13%
|-
|14||315||98k||TECH +70||All Gene Research SPD +14%
|-
|15||330||112k||TECH +75||All Gene Research SPD +15%
|-
|16||345||123k||TECH +80||All Gene Research SPD +16%
|-
|17||360||144k||TECH +85||All Gene Research SPD +17%
|-
|18||375||162k||TECH +90||All Gene Research SPD +18%
|-
|19||390||180k||TECH +95||All Gene Research SPD +19%
|-
|20||400||200k||TECH +100||All Gene Research SPD +20% 
|-
|21||420||220k||TECH +105||All Gene Research SPD +21%
|-
|22||440||242k||TECH +110||All Gene Research SPD +22%
|-
|23||460||264k||TECH +115||All Gene Research SPD +23%
|-
|24||480||285k||TECH +120||All Gene Research SPD +24%
|-
|25||500||309k||TECH +125||All Gene Research SPD +25%
|-
|26||520||333k||TECH +130||All Gene Research SPD +26%
|-
|27||540||357k||TECH +135||All Gene Research SPD +27%
|-
|28||560||381k||TECH +140||All Gene Research SPD +28%
|-
|29||580||405k||TECH +145||All Gene Research SPD +29%
|-
|30||600||429k||TECH +150||All Gene Research SPD +30%
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Taoraemon 5D Tech is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +10
|-
|2||4k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +20
|-
|3||6k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +30
|-
|4||8k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +40
|-
|5||10k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +50
|-
|6||12k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +60
|-
|7||14k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +70
|-
|8||16k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +80
|-
|9||18k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +90
|-
|10||20k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +100
|-
|11||22k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +110
|-
|12||24k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +120
|-
|13||26k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +130
|-
|14||28k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +140
|-
|15||30k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +150
|-
|16||32k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +160
|-
|17||34k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +170
|-
|18||36k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +180
|-
|19||38k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +190
|-
|20||40k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +200
|-
|21||42k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +210
|-
|22||44k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +220
|-
|23||46k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +230
|-
|24||48k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +240
|-
|25||50k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +250
|-
|26||55k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +260
|-
|27||60k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +270
|-
|28||65k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +280
|-
|29||70k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +290
|-
|30||75k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Catcolyte in battle, Troop RUSH +300
|}

==Research Ability ==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Taoraemon specializes in '''Angel Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Angel is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|96|100
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

==Minion - Catcolyte==
Cultivators usually have young lad servants. Their main job is to take care of the cultivators, and they can practice in their spare time!

===Special Ability - Flying Sword===
Per 10 Catcolytes in battle, Troop RUSH +10 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Catcolytes!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Golden Fleece}}<br>{{relink|Golden Fleece}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Dragon Crystal}}<br>{{relink|Dragon Crystal}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Fallen Lucifer}}<br>{{relink|Fallen Lucifer}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Avelon}}<br>{{relink|Avelon}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Buddha's Skull Sarira}}<br>{{relink|Buddha's Skull Sarira}}
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Gaea's Hand}}<br>{{relink|Gaea's Hand}}
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Phoenix Feather}}<br>{{relink|Phoenix Feather}}
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|3-Faced Statue}}<br>{{relink|3-Faced Statue}}
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
